_doc: Pinned manifest for github.com/anthropics/skills patterns we adapted into scripts/{xlsx,pptx,docx,pdf,charts}/. Updated only by the tooling_freshness_review task type after CFO sign-off.

considered_upstream_skills.name: brand-guidelines
considered_upstream_skills.decision: consider on next refresh — could inform deck visual language

considered_upstream_skills.name: canvas-design
considered_upstream_skills.decision: consider on next refresh — could inform chart styling

considered_upstream_skills.name: doc-coauthoring
considered_upstream_skills.decision: consider on next refresh — could inform CEO letter Track Changes flow

considered_upstream_skills.name: internal-comms
considered_upstream_skills.decision: consider on next refresh — could inform exec_summary tone

considered_upstream_skills.name: mcp-builder
considered_upstream_skills.decision: deferred — see plan §4 (no MCP server in scope this build)

considered_upstream_skills.name: skill-creator
considered_upstream_skills.decision: not relevant — we use plain Python scripts not skills per CLAUDE.md decision

considered_upstream_skills.name: theme-factory
considered_upstream_skills.decision: consider on next refresh — could inform palette consistency across xlsx/pptx/docx

xlsx.notes: Adapted: blue/black/green/red color coding, formula-correctness checks, claim-id-as-comment provenance. Omitted: full XSD validation pipeline (we don't author OOXML directly), pptx/docx schema reuse.

pptx.notes: Adapted: 16:9 widescreen, slide-builder primitives, speaker-notes provenance. Omitted: pptxgenjs (Node.js) — we use python-pptx for corporate environment friendliness; thumbnail QA (Anthropic uses Pillow + LibreOffice).

docx.notes: Adapted: explicit page dimensions, smart-quote-friendly typography, named heading/body styles. Omitted: docx-js (JavaScript), tracked-changes automation, redline simplification.

pdf.notes: PDF is a utility-only converter for us (no PDF-primary deliverables). Adapted: WeasyPrint MD→HTML→PDF for narrative, LibreOffice headless for office-format inputs, graceful degradation when soffice missing. Omitted: form filling, OCR, watermarking, qpdf/pdftk wrappers.

charts.notes: No direct Anthropic-skills counterpart for financial charts. Tracked only so freshness review can flag the day Anthropic ships a charts-related skill.
